subcodes.first_line: O my precious friends, the likeness of those delightful companions who, like unto the supreme Paradise, are the cause of joy to the sorrowing heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران نازنین من عکس آن یاران دلنشین که مانند بهشت برین سبب سرور قلب حزین
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @growth of the Cause, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
